faq.q: How many GCC centers does Autodesk operate in India?
faq.a: Autodesk operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Autodesk have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Autodesk's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: How many people work at Autodesk's India GCCs?
faq.a: Autodesk's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Autodesk's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 12 leaders at Autodesk's India centers, across Finance, IT, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.
